description_long: This is a modern, square-shaped jacuzzi with a deep, contoured white acrylic basin designed for multiple users. The exterior is clad in dark gray horizontal panels, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance suitable for urban outdoor settings. The interior features multiple hydrotherapy jets of various sizes, strategically placed along the walls and seats for optimal massage coverage. Integrated headrests and ergonomic seating are visible, enhancing user comfort. A set of sturdy, matching gray steps is attached to one side, providing easy access to the jacuzzi. Control panels and possible intake or filtration covers are also present, indicating advanced functionality and user control.
description: A square, gray-panelled jacuzzi with a white contoured interior, multiple hydrotherapy jets, and attached gray steps for easy access.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with two wide gray steps and the contoured white basin inside.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the interior jets, headrests, and the steps extending from the left side.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the smooth gray paneling and two rectangular access panels, with no steps visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a single access panel and the steps extending from the right side.
attribute_jets: side wall, round, grouped (approx. 8-10 per side)
attribute_control_panel: Rectangular control panel on the top edge near the side wall, with visible buttons.
attribute_steps: front, 2 steps, plastic or composite material
